issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling for malformed spec files or missing required parameters.

scenarios.name: generate-floor-plan-with-spec
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items, including spec values and room dimensions, while Response B omits key confirmations and spec usage details.

scenarios.name: validate-and-auto-correct-model
scenarios.rationale: Both responses identify the violation and propose a width expansion, but neither references the spec file or confirms all rooms meet minimums; A is slightly more precise in the width calculation.
